title: The Early Maturity of High-Redshift Galaxies: Insights from sSFR, M/L and SFHs at z~7-14
summary: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) has revealed an unexpected excess of UV-bright galaxies at z>10, unaccounted for by extrapolations from pre-JWST observations and theoretical models. Understanding the physical properties and star formation histories (SFH) of high redshift systems is key to distinguish between the different proposed scenarios. We identify and analyse a sample of 2420 robust candidates at z~7-14 drawn from the ASTRODEEP-JWST dataset over ~0.2 deg^2 and model their properties with non-parametric SFHs to derive their specific star formation rate (sSFR) and stellar population properties. We find that the median sSFR and M/L remain roughly constant across the probed redshift range. We show that this result is robust against potential systematics unless a hidden population of dust-enshrouded starbursts, undetectable in current data, exists at these redshifts. In any case, the absence of observed high-sSFR systems at the highest redshifts suggests that any dust-free starburst phase must be short-lived. The observed sSFR evolution is in tension with most (though not all) theoretical models, making it a key quantity for discriminating among competing scenarios. The sample shows a wide range of physical conditions and galaxy classes, including systems with low sSFR and high mass-to-light ratios (M/L) up to z~10, indicative of already evolved galaxies only a few hundred Myr after the Big Bang, and different degrees of dust attenuation. We finally attempt to reconstruct the assembly histories of two sub-samples: a) the highest-M/L galaxies at z~7-8, which appear to have formed the bulk of their stars at least 500 Myr before observation, implying progenitors observable as UV-bright sources at z>20, and b) z>11 galaxies, which formed through stochastic SFH, remaining UV-faint for most of their early evolution, before undergoing recent (~50 Myr old) episodes of major growth.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现z>10处存在意外多的UV亮星系，通过分析2420个z~7-14的星系样本，发现特定恒星形成率(sSFR)和质量-光度比(M/L)在红移范围内基本恒定，与多数理论模型存在矛盾。
AI.motivation: JWST观测到z>10处存在超出预期的UV亮星系，理解这些高红移系统的物理特性和恒星形成历史对于区分不同理论模型至关重要。
AI.method: 从ASTRODEEP-JWST数据集中选取2420个z~7-14的可靠候选星系，使用非参数恒星形成历史模型分析其特定恒星形成率(sSFR)和恒星种群特性。
AI.result: 发现sSFR和M/L中值在探测的红移范围内基本恒定；样本显示广泛的物理条件和星系类型，包括z~10处已演化的星系；最高M/L星系在观测前至少500Myr形成大部分恒星；z>11星系通过随机恒星形成历史形成，早期保持UV暗，近期经历主要增长。
AI.conclusion: 观测到的sSFR演化与多数理论模型存在矛盾，成为区分竞争模型的关键参数；缺乏观测到的高sSFR系统表明任何无尘埃星暴阶段必须是短暂的；星系形成历史呈现多样性，包括早期演化和近期增长两种模式。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）在红移z>10处发现了出乎意料的大量紫外明亮星系，这是基于JWST之前的观测外推和理论模型所未能预见的。理解高红移系统的物理性质和恒星形成历史（SFH）是区分不同提出方案的关键。我们从ASTRODEEP-JWST数据集中识别并分析了约0.2平方度范围内z~7-14的2420个稳健候选体，并使用非参数化SFH对其性质进行建模，以推导其比恒星形成率（sSFR）和星族性质。我们发现，中位sSFR和质光比（M/L）在探测的红移范围内大致保持恒定。我们表明，除非在这些红移处存在当前数据无法探测的隐藏尘埃包裹星暴群，否则这一结果对潜在系统误差是稳健的。无论如何，在最高红移处缺乏观测到的高sSFR系统表明，任何无尘埃星暴阶段都必须是短暂的。观测到的sSFR演化与大多数（尽管并非全部）理论模型存在矛盾，使其成为区分竞争方案的关键量。该样本展示了广泛的物理条件和星系类别，包括在z~10处具有低sSFR和高质光比（M/L）的系统，表明这些星系在大爆炸后仅几亿年就已演化，以及不同程度的尘埃消光。我们最终尝试重建两个子样本的组装历史：a) z~7-8处最高M/L的星系，它们似乎在观测前至少5亿年就形成了大部分恒星，这意味着其前体在z>20处可作为紫外明亮源被观测到；b) z>11的星系，它们通过随机SFH形成，在大部分早期演化中保持紫外暗淡，直到经历近期（约5千万年历史）的主要增长阶段。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：观测到的sSFR演化与多数理论模型存在矛盾，成为区分竞争模型的关键参数；缺乏观测到的高sSFR系统表明任何无尘埃星暴阶段必须是短暂的；星系形成历史呈现多样性，包括早期演化和近期增长两种模式。

title: GA-NIFS: Understanding the ionization nature of EGSY8p7/CEERS-1019. Evidence for a star formation-driven outflow at z = 8.6
comment: 22 pages, 13 figures, Submitted to Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: Understanding the physical conditions and feedback mechanisms in early massive galaxies is essential to uncover how they formed and evolved during the first billion years of the Universe. In this context, the galaxy EGSY8p7/CEERS-1019 at z=8.6 provides an excellent benchmark, given its stellar mass of $10^{9.3}M_\odot$ and elevated N/O abundance despite its sub-solar metallicity. In this study, we present new JWST/NIRSpec observations offering the first spatially resolved spectroscopy of this galaxy, with higher sensitivity and spectral resolution than previous studies. We identify broad (FWHM=650km/s) H$β$ and [OIII] emission components whose emission is located between the two rest-frame UV clumps of the galaxy and extended over a distance of $\sim1kpc$. The morphology and kinematics of these components indicate that the broad emission arises from outflowing gas rather than from an AGN broad-line region. The kinetic energy injection rate from stellar feedback is an order of magnitude higher than that of the outflow, while the radiation pressure rate is comparable to the outflow momentum rate. These results suggest that stellar feedback alone can drive the outflow, with radiation pressure potentially providing the required momentum transfer. We derive a low mass-loading factor ($η=0.16$) and ionizing photon escape fraction ($f_{esc}=0.021\pm0.014$). Together with the high electron density measured ($n_e=2200cm^{-3}$), these results support the interpretation that most of the gas remains confined within the galaxy. Comparisons of diagnostic emission-line ratios with photoionization and shock models support a star-formation-driven ionization scenario, ruling out any excitation by AGN radiation. Finally, the absence of detectable Wolf-Rayet features suggests that alternative mechanisms must be considered to explain the high N/O ratio in this galaxy.

AI.tldr: JWST观测揭示z=8.6早期大质量星系EGSY8p7/CEERS-1019中存在宽发射线成分，这些成分源于恒星反馈驱动的外流气体而非活动星系核，表明恒星反馈足以驱动外流，辐射压可能提供所需动量转移。
AI.motivation: 研究早期大质量星系的物理条件和反馈机制对于理解宇宙最初十亿年内星系的形成和演化至关重要。星系EGSY8p7/CEERS-1019在z=8.6时具有较高恒星质量和亚太阳金属丰度下的高N/O丰度，为研究提供了理想基准。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec进行新的空间分辨光谱观测，获得比以往研究更高的灵敏度和光谱分辨率。通过分析宽发射线成分的形态和运动学特征，结合诊断发射线比率与光致电离和激波模型的比较，评估恒星反馈机制。
AI.result: 识别出FWHM=650km/s的宽Hβ和[OIII]发射成分，位于星系两个静止紫外团块之间，延伸约1kpc。这些成分源于外流气体而非活动星系核宽线区。恒星反馈的动能注入率比外流高一个数量级，辐射压率与外流动量率相当。获得低质量加载因子(η=0.16)和低电离光子逃逸分数(f_esc=0.021±0.014)，高电子密度(n_e=2200cm^{-3})表明大部分气体仍被限制在星系内。
AI.conclusion: 恒星反馈足以驱动观测到的外流，辐射压可能提供所需的动量转移。发射线比率分析支持恒星形成驱动的电离场景，排除了活动星系核辐射的激发。未检测到沃尔夫-拉叶特征表明需要其他机制来解释该星系的高N/O比。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 理解早期大质量星系的物理条件和反馈机制对于揭示它们在宇宙最初十亿年内如何形成和演化至关重要。在此背景下，红移z=8.6的星系EGSY8p7/CEERS-1019提供了一个极好的基准，其恒星质量为10^9.3太阳质量，尽管金属丰度低于太阳，但具有较高的N/O丰度比。在本研究中，我们展示了新的JWST/NIRSpec观测数据，首次提供了该星系的空间分辨光谱，其灵敏度和光谱分辨率均高于以往研究。我们识别出宽（FWHM=650 km/s）的Hβ和[OIII]发射成分，其发射位于星系两个静止框架紫外团块之间，并延伸约1千秒差距。这些成分的形态和运动学表明，宽发射来自外流气体，而非活动星系核的宽线区。恒星反馈的动能注入率比外流高一个数量级，而辐射压速率与外流动量率相当。这些结果表明，仅恒星反馈就能驱动外流，辐射压可能提供了所需的动量转移。我们推导出低质量负载因子（η=0.16）和电离光子逃逸分数（f_esc=0.021±0.014）。结合测得的高电子密度（n_e=2200 cm^{-3}），这些结果支持大部分气体仍被限制在星系内的解释。发射线比率诊断与光致电离和激波模型的比较支持恒星形成驱动的电离场景，排除了活动星系核辐射的任何激发。最后，未检测到沃尔夫-拉叶特征表明，必须考虑其他机制来解释该星系的高N/O比。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：恒星反馈足以驱动观测到的外流，辐射压可能提供所需的动量转移。发射线比率分析支持恒星形成驱动的电离场景，排除了活动星系核辐射的激发。未检测到沃尔夫-拉叶特征表明需要其他机制来解释该星系的高N/O比。

title: Euclid preparation. Review of forecast constraints on dark energy and modified gravity
summary: The Euclid mission has been designed to provide, as one of its main deliverables, information on the nature of the gravitational interaction, which determines the expansion of the Universe and the formation of structures. Thus, Euclid has the potential to test deviations from general relativity that will allow us to shed light on long-lasting problems in the standard cosmological model, $Λ$CDM. Euclid will mainly do this by using two complementary probes: weak gravitational lensing and galaxy clustering. In this paper we review pre-launch Euclid analyses for dark energy and modified gravity. These include forecast constraints with future Euclid data on cosmological parameters for different cosmological models, such as a time-varying dark energy component, phenomenological modifications of the perturbation sector and specific modified gravity models, with further extensions that include neutrino physics and the coupling to the electromagnetic sector through the fine-structure constant. We review the study of the impact of nonlinear clustering methods on beyond-$Λ$CDM constraints with Euclid. This is of fundamental importance to efficiently predict the large-scale clustering of matter and dark matter halos, given that we will have access to a wealth of information on scales beyond the linear regime. We inspect the extension of theoretical predictions for observable quantities in alternative cosmologies to $Λ$CDM at fully nonlinear scales by means of $N$-body simulations. We discuss the impact of relativistic corrections in extended cosmological models. Overall, this review highlights the significant potential of the Euclid mission to tightly constrain parameters of dark energy and modified gravity models, or perhaps to detect possible signatures of a $Λ$CDM failure.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了欧几里得任务在发射前对暗能量和修正引力模型的分析，包括参数约束预测、非线性聚类方法影响、N体模拟扩展以及相对论修正，展示了欧几里得任务在测试ΛCDM模型和探索引力本质方面的巨大潜力。
AI.motivation: 欧几里得任务旨在通过弱引力透镜和星系聚类两种互补探针，测试广义相对论的偏差，解决标准宇宙学模型ΛCDM中长期存在的问题，从而揭示引力相互作用的本质和宇宙膨胀与结构形成的机制。
AI.method: 采用两种主要方法：1) 使用未来欧几里得数据进行不同宇宙学模型的参数约束预测，包括时变暗能量、扰动区现象学修正和特定修正引力模型；2) 研究非线性聚类方法对超越ΛCDM约束的影响，通过N体模拟将可观测量的理论预测扩展到完全非线性尺度，并讨论相对论修正的影响。
AI.result: 欧几里得任务具有显著潜力：能够紧密约束暗能量和修正引力模型的参数，可能检测到ΛCDM失效的迹象，特别是在非线性尺度上通过精确预测物质和暗物质晕的大尺度聚类，为理解引力本质提供关键信息。
AI.conclusion: 欧几里得任务通过弱引力透镜和星系聚类的互补探针，结合非线性聚类分析和N体模拟扩展，将能够严格测试广义相对论偏差，为暗能量性质和引力相互作用本质提供关键约束，可能揭示标准宇宙学模型的局限性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 欧几里得任务的主要目标之一是提供关于引力相互作用本质的信息，这决定了宇宙的膨胀和结构的形成。因此，欧几里得有可能测试广义相对论的偏差，从而揭示标准宇宙学模型ΛCDM中长期存在的问题。欧几里得主要通过两种互补的探针来实现这一目标：弱引力透镜和星系聚类。本文回顾了欧几里得任务发射前关于暗能量和修正引力的分析。这些分析包括利用未来欧几里得数据对不同宇宙学模型（如时变暗能量成分、扰动区的唯象修正以及特定修正引力模型）的宇宙学参数进行预测约束，并进一步扩展到中微子物理和通过精细结构常数与电磁区的耦合。我们回顾了非线性聚类方法对超越ΛCDM约束的影响研究。鉴于我们将获得线性区以外尺度上的丰富信息，这对于有效预测物质和暗物质晕的大尺度聚类至关重要。我们考察了通过N体模拟将替代宇宙学中可观测量的理论预测扩展到完全非线性尺度上的ΛCDM。我们讨论了相对论修正对扩展宇宙学模型的影响。总体而言，本综述强调了欧几里得任务在严格约束暗能量和修正引力模型参数方面的巨大潜力，或者可能探测到ΛCDM失败的迹象。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：欧几里得任务通过弱引力透镜和星系聚类的互补探针，结合非线性聚类分析和N体模拟扩展，将能够严格测试广义相对论偏差，为暗能量性质和引力相互作用本质提供关键约束，可能揭示标准宇宙学模型的局限性。

title: The stellar and dark matter distributions in elliptical galaxies measured by stacked weak gravitational lensing
summary: We investigate stellar mass and central dark matter density profiles of photometric luminous red galaxies with stellar masses of $\sim10^{10}-10^{12}M_\odot$ using weak gravitational lensing measurements from the Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program data obtained with the Subaru Telescope. By stacking weak lensing signals from a large number of galaxies, we obtain average tangential shear profiles down to $\sim 10\,\mathrm{kpc}/h$, which are fitted assuming a two-component model consisting of stellar and dark matter components to constrain their central dark matter distribution. We find a preference for non-zero core radii of dark matter distributions in galaxies with stellar masses of $\sim 10^{11}M_\odot$. Our results imply a stronger feedback effect than that typically predicted by current hydrodynamical simulations. In addition, we provide a new constraint on the stellar-to-halo mass relation, where both stellar and halo masses are, for the first time, directly constrained by weak gravitational lensing. Our results prefer the stellar initial mass function (IMF) that is more bottom-heavy than the Salpeter IMF.

title: Interpretable machine learning of halo gas density profiles: a sensitivity analysis of cosmological hydrodynamical simulations
comment: To be submitted to The Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: Stellar and AGN-driven feedback processes affect the distribution of gas on a wide range of scales, from within galaxies well into the intergalactic medium. Yet, it remains unclear how feedback, through its connection to key galaxy properties, shapes the radial gas density profile in the host halo. We tackle this question using suites of the EAGLE, IllustrisTNG, and Simba cosmological hydrodynamical simulations, which span a variety of feedback models. We develop a random forest algorithm that predicts the radial gas density profile within haloes from the total halo mass and five global properties of the central galaxy: gas and stellar mass; star formation rate; mass and accretion rate of the central black hole (BH). The algorithm reproduces the simulated gas density profiles with an average accuracy of $\sim$80-90% over the halo mass range $10^{9.5} \, \mathrm{M}_{\odot} < M_{\rm 200c} < 10^{15} \, \mathrm{M}_{\odot}$ and redshift interval $0<z<4$. For the first time, we apply Sobol statistical sensitivity analysis to full cosmological hydrodynamical simulations, quantifying how each feature affects the gas density as a function of distance from the halo centre. Across all simulations and redshifts, the total halo mass and the gas mass of the central galaxy are the most strongly tied to the halo gas distribution, while stellar and BH properties are generally less informative. The exact relative importance of the different features depends on the feedback scenario and redshift. Our framework can be readily embedded in semi-analytic models of galaxy formation to incorporate halo gas density profiles consistent with different hydrodynamical simulations. Our work also provides a proof of concept for constraining feedback models with future observations of galaxy properties and of the surrounding gas distribution.

AI.tldr: 使用随机森林算法分析EAGLE、IllustrisTNG和Simba宇宙流体动力学模拟，预测星系晕内气体密度分布，发现总晕质量和中心星系气体质量对气体分布影响最大。
AI.motivation: 恒星和活动星系核驱动的反馈过程在从星系内部到星系际介质的广泛尺度上影响气体分布，但反馈如何通过关键星系属性塑造宿主晕内径向气体密度剖面仍不清楚。
AI.method: 使用EAGLE、IllustrisTNG和Simba宇宙流体动力学模拟套件，开发随机森林算法，从总晕质量和五个中心星系全局属性（气体质量、恒星质量、恒星形成率、中心黑洞质量和吸积率）预测晕内径向气体密度剖面。
AI.result: 算法在晕质量范围10^9.5-10^15 M☉和红移0-4内以约80-90%的平均准确度再现模拟气体密度剖面。总晕质量和中心星系气体质量对晕气体分布影响最大，恒星和黑洞属性信息量较少。特征相对重要性取决于反馈场景和红移。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可嵌入星系形成的半解析模型，纳入与不同流体动力学模拟一致的晕气体密度剖面。为利用未来星系属性和周围气体分布观测约束反馈模型提供了概念验证。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星和活动星系核驱动的反馈过程影响从星系内部到星系际介质广泛尺度上的气体分布。然而，反馈如何通过其与关键星系属性的联系来塑造宿主晕中的径向气体密度剖面仍不清楚。我们利用EAGLE、IllustrisTNG和Simba宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件（涵盖多种反馈模型）来探讨这一问题。我们开发了一种随机森林算法，该算法根据总晕质量和中心星系的五个全局属性（气体质量、恒星质量、恒星形成率、中心黑洞质量及吸积率）预测晕内径向气体密度剖面。该算法在晕质量范围10^9.5 M_sun < M_200c < 10^15 M_sun和红移区间0<z<4内，以约80-90%的平均精度再现了模拟的气体密度剖面。我们首次将Sobol统计敏感性分析应用于完整的宇宙学流体动力学模拟，量化了每个特征如何随距晕中心距离影响气体密度。在所有模拟和红移中，总晕质量和中心星系的气体质量与晕气体分布关联最强，而恒星和黑洞属性通常信息量较少。不同特征的确切相对重要性取决于反馈情景和红移。我们的框架可以轻松嵌入星系形成的半解析模型中，以纳入与不同流体动力学模拟一致的晕气体密度剖面。我们的工作也为利用未来对星系属性和周围气体分布的观测来约束反馈模型提供了概念验证。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: （基于可用摘要翻译）该框架可嵌入星系形成的半解析模型，纳入与不同流体动力学模拟一致的晕气体密度剖面。为利用未来星系属性和周围气体分布观测约束反馈模型提供了概念验证。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Modified inverse hyperbolic sine function (solid line) as defined in equation ( 1 ), which we applied to a subset of the input features ( M ˙ ⋆ \dot{M}_{\star} , M ˙ BH \dot{M}_{BH} , M BH M_{BH} ) to improve the performance of the RF algorithm (see § 3.2 for details). For masses above ∼ 7 ​ M ⊙ \sim 7\>{M}_{\odot} (or accretion rates above ∼ 7 ​ M ⊙ ​ yr − 1 \sim 7\>{M}_{\odot}\,yr^{-1} ), the function asymptotes to the decimal logarithm. As the property in question approaches zero, the function is well approximated by a linear relationship. In this figure, we zoom in the region where the smooth transition from linear to logarithmic regimes occurs. Crucially for properties such as the SFR, BH mass and accretion rate, the function is well defined at zero, thus making it preferable over a pure logarithmic function. At the same time, the scaling will be effectively logarithmic for large values of the input features. For example, the black hole mass can assume values ranging from zero to as large as ∼ 10 10 ​ M ⊙ \sim 10^{10}\>{M}_{\odot} ; the modified inverse hyperbolic sine is well defined in zero, while effectively scaling the BH mass logarithmically for M BH ≫ 7 ​ M ⊙ M_{BH}\gg 7\,\>{M}_{\odot} .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：方程(1)中定义的修正反双曲正弦函数（实线），我们将其应用于部分输入特征（M_dot_star、M_dot_BH、M_BH）以提高RF算法的性能（详见§3.2）。对于质量大于约7 M_sun（或吸积率大于约7 M_sun/yr）的情况，该函数渐近于常用对数。当所考虑属性趋近于零时，该函数近似为线性关系。本图放大了从线性到对数区域平滑过渡的区域。对于恒星形成率、黑洞质量和吸积率等属性至关重要的是，该函数在零处定义良好，因此优于纯对数函数。同时，对于大的输入特征值，该缩放将有效地呈对数形式。例如，黑洞质量可以从零变化到高达约10^10 M_sun；修正反双曲正弦函数在零处定义良好，同时对于M_BH >> 7 M_sun，有效地对黑洞质量进行对数缩放。

figures.caption_zh: 图3：在红移z=0时，从IllustrisTNG模拟测试集中提取的晕周围总气体密度的球平均共动径向剖面。每个面板对应列顶部指示的M_200c区间内的晕的气体密度剖面，这些晕的中心星系总气体质量在面板内标注的范围内。落在二维区间内的晕的数量显示在面板左上角。直接从模拟获得的剖面和RF算法的预测遵循与图1中间面板相同的颜色编码、线型和误差棒。每个面板内的插图显示了相应M_200c-M_gas区间内预测与真实气体密度剖面在相关径向范围内的比值。我们的RF算法通常在10%以内恢复真实气体密度剖面。考虑到输入特征数量较少以及气体密度剖面跨越高达四个数量级的宽动态范围，这是一项显著的成就。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Average accuracy of the RF algorithm, as defined in § 4 , at reproducing the gas density profiles in the test sets of the EAGLE-100, IllustrisTNG, and Simba-100 simulations at redshift z = 0 z=0 , as a function of the radial distance from the centre of the halo. The error bars indicate the 16 th − 84 th 16^{th}-84^{th} percentile spread of the accuracy within each 2D-bin of M 200 ​ c M_{200c} and M gas M_{gas} , the bounds of which are indicated in the upper part of the figure and in the annotation within each panel, respectively. The highest mean accuracy is above 90% for EAGLE-100 and IllustrisTNG, and about 85% for Simba-100. In general, the accuracy does not vary significantly over radial distance, although it can decay closer to the halo centre in specific 2D bins.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：RF算法在红移z=0时，在EAGLE-100、IllustrisTNG和Simba-100模拟测试集中再现气体密度剖面的平均精度（如§4所定义），作为距晕中心径向距离的函数。误差棒表示每个M_200c和M_gas二维区间内精度的16th-84th百分位分布，区间边界分别显示在图的上部和每个面板的注释中。EAGLE-100和IllustrisTNG的最高平均精度超过90%，Simba-100约为85%。总体而言，精度随径向距离变化不大，但在特定二维区间内，靠近晕中心时精度可能下降。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Overall accuracy of the RF algorithm at reproducing the gas density profiles in all simulations considered, averaged over all radial bins and all haloes, as a function of redshift (see § 4 for details). The left panel shows the results for the training set: the accuracy is above 92% for all simulations, highlighting the self-consistency of the algorithm. The right panel shows the results for the test set: all flagship simulations maintain a high accuracy ( ∼ \sim 85% for Simba-100, ∼ \sim 90% for EAGLE-100 and IllustrisTNG) down to z = 1 z=1 , with a few-percent decay at z = 0 z=0 . Nevertheless, this test proves that the algorithm can reproduce with high fidelity density profiles over which it was not trained, hence underscoring its predictive power.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：RF算法在所有考虑的模拟中再现气体密度剖面的总体精度，对所有径向区间和所有晕进行平均，作为红移的函数（详见§4）。左面板显示训练集的结果：所有模拟的精度均高于92%，突出了算法的自洽性。右面板显示测试集的结果：所有旗舰模拟在红移z=1时保持高精度（Simba-100约85%，EAGLE-100和IllustrisTNG约90%），在z=0时下降几个百分点。尽管如此，该测试证明算法能够高保真地再现其未训练过的密度剖面，从而强调了其预测能力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Sampling of the parameter space of the input features obtained from generating a Saltelli sequence (Saltelli et al., 2010 ) This technique, combined with the modified inverse hyperbolic sine function applied to certain features ( M ˙ ⋆ \dot{M}_{\star} , M ˙ BH \dot{M}_{BH} , M BH M_{BH} ; see § 3.2 and Figure 2 ), ensures unbiased sampling over several orders of magnitudes, including null values. For illustrative purposes, this figure refers to a Saltelli sequence with index N S = 2 7 N_{S}=2^{7} , but we adopted N S = 2 14 N_{S}=2^{14} in our analysis, to more finely sample the parameter space (see § 5.2 for details). In this figure, the boundaries each feature matches the ranges found for the Simba-100 simulation. We change them accordingly when we apply sensitivity analysis to other simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：通过生成Saltelli序列（Saltelli等人，2010）对输入特征参数空间进行采样。该技术结合应用于某些特征（M_dot_star、M_dot_BH、M_BH；见§3.2和图2）的修正反双曲正弦函数，确保了在几个数量级上的无偏采样，包括零值。为便于说明，本图参考了指数N_S=2^7的Saltelli序列，但我们在分析中采用了N_S=2^14，以更精细地采样参数空间（详见§5.2）。在本图中，每个特征的边界与Simba-100模拟中发现的取值范围相匹配。当我们将敏感性分析应用于其他模拟时，会相应更改这些边界。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Results of the Sobol sensitivity analysis applied to our RF algorithm. Each row of panels refers to a different flagship simulation, as indicated in the left part of the figure. Every column corresponds to a different redshift, as reported in the top of the figure. Within each panel, the data points represent the S 1 S_{1} Sobol coefficients representing the importance of a certain input feature in predicting the gas density profile at different radial bins. Each feature is associated with a different colour and marker style, as indicated in the legend. The error bars report the 95% confidence level associated with the S 1 S_{1} coefficients at each radial bin. In every panel, the solid lines represent the S T S_{T} Sobol coefficients, and the shaded areas the corresponding 95% confidence level. The colour coding for the S T S_{T} coefficients is the same as for the S 1 S_{1} coefficients. The grey shaded area in every panels represents the region within which the variance on the predicted density profile introduced by any input feature would be smaller than the intrinsic accuracy of the gas density profile predicted through our RF algorithm. Thus, input features with Sobol indexes falling below the threshold between the grey and white regions do not have a physically meaningful effect on the gas density profile at the radial bin considered. In all simulations and at all redshifts, the total gas mass of the central galaxy is the most impactful feature on the prediction of the as density profile. The SFR and the accretion rate of the BH in the central galaxy are the least consequential properties.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：应用于我们RF算法的Sobol敏感性分析结果。每行面板对应不同的旗舰模拟，如图左侧所示。每列对应不同的红移，如图顶部所示。在每个面板内，数据点表示S_1 Sobol系数，代表某个输入特征在预测不同径向区间气体密度剖面时的重要性。每个特征关联不同的颜色和标记样式，如图例所示。误差棒报告每个径向区间S_1系数的95%置信水平。在每个面板中，实线表示S_T Sobol系数，阴影区域表示相应的95%置信水平。S_T系数的颜色编码与S_1系数相同。每个面板中的灰色阴影区域表示任何输入特征引入的预测密度剖面方差小于通过RF算法预测的气体密度剖面固有精度的区域。因此，Sobol指数低于灰色和白色区域之间阈值的输入特征在考虑的径向区间内对气体密度剖面没有物理上有意义的影响。在所有模拟和所有红移下，中心星系的总气体质量是对气体密度剖面预测影响最大的特征。中心星系的恒星形成率和黑洞吸积率是最不重要的属性。

title: SLICE -- Combining Strong Lensing and X-ray in AC\,114. Insights into the Merger Scenario
summary: AC114 is a historically significant galaxy cluster, being one of the first strong lensing clusters detected from the ground in the early 1990s, prior to the launch of the HST. Despite this early prominence, no detailed lensing analyses have been carried out for more than fifteen years. We here study this cluster using JWST imaging obtained as part of the SLICE program, complemented by archival HST and X-ray observations. JWST data reveal ten new multiply imaged systems and enable the identification of conjugate substructures in several of the sixteen systems, significantly increasing the number of strong lensing constraints. Using these data, we construct a parametric mass model with Lenstool and extend it by explicitly incorporating the Chandra data in a combined strong lensing+X-ray fit. Our best-fit model reproduces the multiple images with an RMS of 0.4" while simultaneously matching the X-ray data. The dark matter distribution is unimodal and centered on the brightest cluster galaxy, with a large core radius of 83+-5kpc, consistent with values reported in other strong lensing clusters. The strong lensing constraints require the inclusion of an external shear component which position angle points unambiguously towards a nearby (~1Mpc), well defined mass concentration at the same redshift in the North-West, for which we propose the naming AC114b. The spatial coverage of the XMM-Newton data encompasses the whole structure, allowing us to probe the X-ray properties of the companion cluster and the thermodynamics of AC114, providing evidence for a major merger, in line with previous signatures seen in Chandra, radio and optical spectroscopic data. Our results shed new light on the merging scenario, revealing a major merger caught in a late post-collisional phase, where AC114 is the dominant system and Ac114b has likely been stripped of its hot gas.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST、HST和X射线数据对AC114星系团进行详细引力透镜分析，发现新的多重成像系统，揭示该星系团处于晚期碰撞后阶段，并识别出伴星系团AC114b。
AI.motivation: AC114是20世纪90年代初地面观测发现的重要引力透镜星系团，但已有15年以上未进行详细透镜分析。研究旨在利用现代观测技术重新研究该星系团，特别是结合JWST、HST和X射线数据，以深入了解其质量分布和动力学状态。
AI.method: 使用JWST SLICE项目的成像数据，结合HST和X射线档案数据。通过JWST数据识别新的多重成像系统，使用Lenstool构建参数化质量模型，并将Chandra X射线数据纳入联合拟合（强透镜+X射线）。同时利用XMM-Newton数据分析伴星系团的热力学性质。
AI.result: JWST数据发现10个新的多重成像系统，总约束数量显著增加。最佳拟合模型以0.4"的RMS再现多重图像，同时匹配X射线数据。暗物质分布为单峰型，中心位于最亮星系团星系，核心半径83±5kpc。强透镜约束需要包含指向西北方向约1Mpc处伴星系团AC114b的外部剪切分量。X射线数据证实这是一个主要合并事件，AC114处于主导地位，而AC114b可能已被剥离热气体。
AI.conclusion: AC114星系团正处于晚期碰撞后阶段，是一个主要合并系统。研究揭示了其详细的暗物质分布和动力学状态，并识别出伴星系团AC114b。这些发现为理解星系团合并过程提供了新见解，展示了多波长观测在星系团研究中的重要性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: AC114是一个具有历史意义的星系团，是20世纪90年代初哈勃太空望远镜发射前，最早从地面探测到的强引力透镜星系团之一。尽管早期备受关注，但十五年来未进行过详细的透镜分析。我们利用SLICE项目获得的JWST成像数据，辅以HST和X射线档案数据，对该星系团进行了研究。JWST数据揭示了十个新的多重成像系统，并使得在十六个系统中的几个系统中识别出共轭子结构成为可能，显著增加了强引力透镜约束的数量。利用这些数据，我们使用Lenstool构建了一个参数化质量模型，并通过明确纳入钱德拉数据，将其扩展为强透镜+X射线联合拟合。我们的最佳拟合模型以0.4角秒的均方根再现了多重图像，同时匹配了X射线数据。暗物质分布呈单峰状，中心位于最亮的星系团星系，具有83±5千秒差距的大核心半径，与其他强透镜星系团报告的值一致。强透镜约束要求包含一个外部剪切分量，其位置角明确指向西北方向约1兆秒差距处、同一红移的一个明确质量集中区，我们提议将其命名为AC114b。XMM-牛顿数据的空间覆盖范围涵盖了整个结构，使我们能够探测伴星系团的X射线性质以及AC114的热力学状态，为一次主要并合提供了证据，这与之前在钱德拉、射电和光学光谱数据中看到的迹象一致。我们的结果为并合情景提供了新见解，揭示了一次处于晚期碰撞后阶段的主要并合，其中AC114是主导系统，而AC114b可能已被剥离了其热气体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要翻译：AC114星系团正处于晚期碰撞后阶段，是一个主要合并系统。研究揭示了其详细的暗物质分布和动力学状态，并识别出伴星系团AC114b。这些发现为理解星系团合并过程提供了新见解，展示了多波长观测在星系团研究中的重要性。

title: Footprints in the Wind: Probing X-ray Outflows in NGC 7469 using Near-Infrared Emission Lines
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures, 5 tables. Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: AGN winds play an important role in the co-evolution of supermassive black holes and their host galaxies, yet their driving mechanisms and impact on star formation remain subjects of active investigation. Critically, the lack of X-ray Integral Field Units currently limits our ability to acquire spatially resolved velocity information in the X-ray regime. However, instead, this can be achieved using the James Webb Space Telescope. As part of an ongoing investigation of the nuclear feedback processes in the nearby luminous AGN NGC 7469, we present an analysis of the kinematics of the X-ray emitting outflows using near-infrared footprint lines such as [Mg VIII] 3.03 um. These high-ionization emission lines are associated with the same gas analyzed in the X-ray, and thus can be used to probe the footprint of the X-ray wind's velocity structure and ionization state. Thanks to the wide wavelength range available with JWST we also use nebular (e.g. [S IV] 10.51 um) and coronal (e.g. [Ne V] 14.32 um) emission lines to offer a comprehensive multi-phase view of the outflows. We present mass and kinetic energy outflow rates, and find that while the feedback processes in NGC 7469 are not efficient by theoretical benchmarks, the most massive and energetic component is the high ionization X-ray gas.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 活动星系核（AGN）风在超大质量黑洞与其宿主星系的共同演化中扮演重要角色，但其驱动机制及对恒星形成的影响仍是活跃的研究课题。关键问题在于，目前缺乏X射线积分场单元，限制了我们在X射线波段获取空间分辨速度信息的能力。然而，詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）可以实现这一目标。作为对邻近明亮AGN NGC 7469核反馈过程持续研究的一部分，我们利用近红外足迹线（如[Mg VIII] 3.03微米）分析了X射线发射外流的运动学。这些高电离发射线与X射线分析中的同一气体相关，因此可用于探测X射线风速度结构和电离状态的足迹。借助JWST的宽波长范围，我们还使用星云线（如[S IV] 10.51微米）和冕线（如[Ne V] 14.32微米）来提供外流的多相视图。我们给出了质量和动能外流率，并发现虽然NGC 7469中的反馈过程在理论基准下效率不高，但质量最大、能量最高的成分是高电离X射线气体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，JWST能够通过近红外高电离发射线有效追踪X射线外流的运动学特征，为研究活动星系核反馈机制提供了新的观测手段。

title: A High-resolution Study of the Cold Neutral Medium in and around 30 Doradus
comment: 25 pages, 20 figures, 7 tables, Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: With the aim of evaluating the roles of the cold neutral medium (CNM) in the cloud-scale baryon cycle, we perform a high-resolution study of the CNM in and around the extreme star-forming region 30 Doradus (30 Dor). For our study, we use Galactic Australian Square Kilometre Array Pathfinder H I Survey data and produce H I emission and absorption cubes on 7 pc scales. To examine the CNM structures toward 30 Dor, we decompose the H I absorption cube into 862 Gaussian components and find that these components are distributed at four velocity ranges (B1, B2, B3, and B4, respectively): 200$-$230 km s$^{-1}$, 230$-$260 km s$^{-1}$, 260$-$277 km s$^{-1}$, and 277$-$300 km s$^{-1}$. We derive line-of-sight average spin temperatures and opacity-corrected total H I column densities and show that the B1$-$B4 structures have systematically different properties, indicating that they are physically distinct. As for the nature of the observed CNM structures, we find that B2 is associated with the main dense structure where ionized, atomic, and molecular gases are concentrated. B3 and B4 trace inflows whose combined mass flux rate of 0.14 $M_{\odot}$ yr$^{-1}$ is comparable to the current star formation rate, while B1 probes outflows with a much lower mass flux rate of 0.007 $M_{\odot}$ yr$^{-1}$. Interestingly, the H I column densities in B1$-$B4 are nearly uniform with a factor of two spatial variations, implying the presence of H I shielding layers for H$_{2}$ formation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高分辨率HI观测，分析了30 Doradus极端恒星形成区中的冷中性介质结构，发现了四个不同速度范围的CNM成分，分别对应不同的物理过程和气体流动。
AI.motivation: 评估冷中性介质在云尺度重子循环中的作用，特别是在极端恒星形成区30 Doradus中的角色。
AI.method: 使用澳大利亚平方公里阵列探路者HI巡天数据，在7pc尺度上生成HI发射和吸收立方体；通过高斯分解将HI吸收立方体分解为862个成分，分析四个不同速度范围的CNM结构。
AI.result: 识别出四个不同速度范围的CNM结构：B1(200-230 km/s)对应外流，B2(230-260 km/s)对应主要致密结构，B3和B4(260-300 km/s)对应内流；内流质量通量率(0.14 M⊙/yr)与当前恒星形成率相当，外流质量通量率较低(0.007 M⊙/yr)；所有结构的HI柱密度变化较小，表明存在HI屏蔽层促进H2形成。
AI.conclusion: 30 Doradus中的CNM结构具有系统性差异，分别对应不同的物理过程；内流质量通量与恒星形成率相当，表明CNM在维持恒星形成中起重要作用；均匀的HI柱密度分布暗示HI屏蔽层对分子云形成的重要性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 为了评估冷中性介质（CNM）在云尺度重子循环中的作用，我们对极端恒星形成区30 Doradus（30 Dor）及其周围的CNM进行了高分辨率研究。研究中使用了银河系澳大利亚平方公里阵列探路者H I巡天数据，生成了7 pc尺度的H I发射和吸收立方体。为分析30 Dor方向的CNM结构，我们将H I吸收立方体分解为862个高斯分量，发现这些分量分布在四个速度区间（B1、B2、B3和B4）：200–230 km s⁻¹、230–260 km s⁻¹、260–277 km s⁻¹和277–300 km s⁻¹。我们推导了视线平均自旋温度和经过不透明度校正的总H I柱密度，并表明B1–B4结构具有系统性差异，表明它们在物理上是不同的。关于观测到的CNM结构的性质，我们发现B2与主致密结构相关，其中电离气体、原子气体和分子气体集中。B3和B4示踪了内流，其总质量通量率为0.14 M☉ yr⁻¹，与当前恒星形成率相当，而B1探测了外流，其质量通量率低得多，为0.007 M☉ yr⁻¹。有趣的是，B1–B4中的H I柱密度几乎均匀，空间变化仅有两倍，这表明存在用于H₂形成的H I屏蔽层。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：30 Doradus中的CNM结构具有系统性差异，分别对应不同的物理过程；内流质量通量与恒星形成率相当，表明CNM在维持恒星形成中起重要作用；均匀的HI柱密度分布暗示HI屏蔽层对分子云形成的重要性。

title: Self-consistent secondary cosmic microwave background anisotropies and extragalactic foregrounds in the FLAMINGO simulations
comment: 21 pages plus 3 appendices, 24 figures. Submitted to MNRAS and all comments welcomed
summary: Secondary anisotropies in the cosmic microwave background (CMB) contain information that can be used to test both cosmological models and models of galaxy formation. Starting from lightcone-based HEALPix maps and catalogues, we present a new set of mock CMB maps constructed in a self-consistent manner from the FLAMINGO suite of cosmological hydrodynamical simulations, including CMB lensing, thermal and kinetic Sunyaev-Zeldovich effects, cosmic infrared background, radio point source and anisotropic screening maps. We show that these simulations reproduce a wide range of observational constraints. We also compare our simulations with previous predictions based on dark matter-only simulations which generally model the secondary anisotropies independently from one another, concluding that our hydrodynamical simulation mocks perform at least as well as previous mocks in matching the observations whilst retaining self-consistency in the predictions of the different components. Using the model variations in FLAMINGO, we further explore how the signals depend on cosmology and feedback modelling, and we predict cross-correlations between some of the signals that differ significantly from those in previous mocks. The mock CMB maps should provide a valuable resource for exploring correlations between different secondary anisotropies and other large-scale structure tracers, and can be applied to forecasts for upcoming surveys.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙微波背景（CMB）中的次级各向异性包含可用于检验宇宙学模型和星系形成模型的信息。基于光锥HEALPix图和星表，我们提出了一套新的自洽模拟CMB图，这些图来自FLAMINGO宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件，包括CMB透镜效应、热学和运动学Sunyaev-Zeldovich效应、宇宙红外背景、射电点源以及各向异性屏蔽图。我们表明，这些模拟再现了广泛的观测约束。我们还将我们的模拟与先前基于暗物质-only模拟的预测进行了比较，这些模拟通常独立地模拟次级各向异性，结论是我们的流体动力学模拟模拟在匹配观测方面至少与先前的模拟一样好，同时保持了不同成分预测的自洽性。利用FLAMINGO中的模型变化，我们进一步探讨了信号如何依赖于宇宙学和反馈建模，并预测了某些信号之间的互相关，这些互相关与先前模拟中的显著不同。这些模拟CMB图应为探索不同次级各向异性之间以及它们与其他大尺度结构示踪物之间的相关性提供宝贵资源，并可应用于未来巡天观测的预测研究。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该套自洽的CMB模拟地图为探索不同次级各向异性之间以及它们与其他大尺度结构示踪物之间的相关性提供了宝贵资源，可应用于未来巡天观测的预测研究。

title: Enhanced rates of stellar radial migration in gas-rich discs at high redshift
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, 1 appendix, submitted to MNRAS, comments welcome!
summary: Radial migration and dynamical heating redistribute stars within galactic discs and thereby modify the chemo-kinematic structure of their host galaxies. Usually, these secular processes are studied in N-body and hydrodynamical simulations of Milky Way analogues with stellar-dominated discs. In contrast, discs at high redshift are gas-rich, which may qualitatively change how secular evolution proceeds. We use the Nexus framework to construct and evolve a suite of isolated galaxies with fixed halo and disc mass but varying initial disc gas fraction, from 0% to 100%. We show that in gas-rich models, the root-mean-square change in stellar angular momentum is up to a factor of two larger than in gas-poor analogues and is accompanied by stronger radial and vertical heating, leading to enhanced radial mixing. We further dissect the role of gas in specific migration channels. For bar-driven migration, corotation resonance dragging dominates in gas-poor discs, whereas in gas-rich discs, stars more readily reach and accumulate at the outer Lindblad resonance, which acts as a barrier. The high radial mixing efficiency in gas-rich phases can flatten the stellar metallicity gradient relative to that of the initial gaseous disc within only a few orbital timescales. Together, these results imply that radial mixing in early, gas-rich discs is substantially more vigorous than in late-time, gas-poor discs, naturally producing distinct evolutionary tracks for chemically bimodal discs such as that of the Milky Way.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过模拟不同气体比例星系的演化，发现富气体星系中的恒星径向迁移和动力学加热比贫气体星系更剧烈，导致更强的径向混合，这能解释银河系等化学双峰盘的形成。
AI.motivation: 传统研究主要关注恒星主导的星系盘演化，但高红移时期的星系盘富含气体，这可能从根本上改变长期演化过程。研究者希望了解气体丰度如何影响恒星径向迁移和动力学加热等长期演化机制。
AI.method: 使用Nexus框架构建并演化一系列孤立星系模型，这些模型具有固定的晕质量和盘质量，但初始盘气体比例从0%到100%变化。通过模拟分析不同气体比例下恒星角动量的变化、径向和垂直加热、径向混合效率等。
AI.result: 富气体模型中恒星角动量的均方根变化比贫气体模型大两倍，伴随更强的径向和垂直加热，导致增强的径向混合。在棒驱动迁移中，贫气体盘以共转共振拖拽为主，而富气体盘中恒星更容易到达并聚集在外Lindblad共振处形成屏障。富气体阶段的高径向混合效率能在几个轨道时间内使恒星金属度梯度相对于初始气体盘梯度变平。
AI.conclusion: 早期富气体盘中的径向混合比晚期贫气体盘显著更剧烈，这自然产生了化学双峰盘（如银河系）的独特演化轨迹，解释了星系盘化学-运动学结构的形成机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 径向迁移和动力学加热会重新分布星系盘内的恒星，从而改变其宿主星系的化学-运动学结构。通常，这些长期演化过程是在以恒星主导的盘为特征的银河系类似体的N体和流体动力学模拟中研究的。相比之下，高红移的盘富含气体，这可能会从根本上改变长期演化的进行方式。我们使用Nexus框架构建并演化了一组孤立星系，这些星系具有固定的暗物质晕和盘质量，但初始盘气体分数从0%到100%不等。我们表明，在富气体模型中，恒星角动量的均方根变化比贫气体类似体大两倍，并伴随着更强的径向和垂向加热，导致增强的径向混合。我们进一步剖析了气体在特定迁移通道中的作用。对于棒驱动的迁移，共转共振拖曳在贫气体盘中占主导地位，而在富气体盘中，恒星更容易到达并积聚在外林德布拉德共振处，后者充当了屏障。富气体阶段的高径向混合效率可以在仅几个轨道时间尺度内使恒星金属丰度梯度相对于初始气体盘变平。这些结果共同表明，早期富气体盘中的径向混合比晚期贫气体盘中的更为剧烈，自然地为化学双峰盘（如银河系）产生了不同的演化轨迹。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：早期富气体盘中的径向混合比晚期贫气体盘显著更剧烈，这自然产生了化学双峰盘（如银河系）的独特演化轨迹，解释了星系盘化学-运动学结构的形成机制。

title: TiNy Titans HI: Discovering Satellites via HI Gas in an Isolated, Compact Group of Dwarf Galaxies
comment: 17 pages, 9 figures, accepted for publication in the Astrophysical Journal
summary: We report on the HI content of an isolated, compact group of 6 dwarf galaxies at a distance of 145 Mpc. The distribution and kinematics of the HI, including multiple gaseous bridges, indicate the group is a gravitationally bound system. The HI maps further reveal two newly discovered dwarf satellites easily identified by their gas but only barely visible in optical images. The four dwarf group members previously identified in SDSS have 9.06 < log(Mstar/Msun) < 9.43 and 9.42 < log(MHI/Msun) < 9.73. The two newly discovered dwarf satellites have log(Mstar/Msun) = 6.10 with log(MHI/Msun) = 8.71 and log(Mstar/Msun) = 7.07 with log(MHI/Msun) = 9.18. New Gemini optical spectra link the HI detections and their optical counterparts. The group's 3D velocity dispersion (188 km/s), mass-to-light ratio (M_L/B ~44), dynamical-to-baryonic mass ratio (Mdyn/Mbary ~ 21), size (69 kpc), and gas fraction (0.56) are all consistent with the compact dwarf groups in the TNG50 simulation. The group has a top-heavy satellite mass function that is inconsistent with predictions for LMC-sized hosts and may instead be two or more groups coming together. A Voronoi tessellation reveals the group resides in a tendril outside the intersection of two filaments. These intermediate density environments within large scale structure provide the conditions needed for groups of star forming, gas-rich dwarf galaxies to form and eventually merge. Our results further show that it is possible to uncover fainter dwarf satellites around dwarf galaxy hosts via HI maps.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过HI观测发现了一个距离145 Mpc的孤立紧凑矮星系群，包含6个矮星系，其中2个是新发现的HI富集但光学暗弱的矮星系。该群具有引力束缚特征，其动力学性质与TNG50模拟中的紧凑矮星系群一致。
AI.motivation: 研究矮星系群的形成和演化机制，特别是在大尺度结构中的中间密度环境中，如何通过HI观测发现光学暗弱的矮星系卫星。
AI.method: 使用HI射电观测绘制气体分布和运动学特征，结合SDSS光学数据和新获得的Gemini光学光谱，进行质量测量、动力学分析，并与TNG50模拟进行比较。
AI.result: 发现了一个包含6个矮星系的引力束缚系统，其中2个是新发现的HI富集但光学暗弱的矮星系。该群具有188 km/s的3D速度弥散、高质光比(~44)、高动力学-重子质量比(~21)、69 kpc的尺寸和0.56的气体分数，与TNG50模拟的紧凑矮星系群一致。
AI.conclusion: 大尺度结构中的中间密度环境为富含气体的矮星系群形成和最终合并提供了条件，HI观测是发现矮星系宿主周围暗弱卫星的有效方法。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了一个由6个矮星系组成的孤立致密群在145 Mpc距离上的HI含量。HI的分布和运动学，包括多个气体桥，表明该群是一个引力束缚系统。HI图谱进一步揭示了两个新发现的矮卫星，它们通过气体很容易被识别，但在光学图像中几乎不可见。先前在SDSS中识别的四个矮群成员具有9.06 < log(Mstar/Msun) < 9.43和9.42 < log(MHI/Msun) < 9.73。两个新发现的矮卫星具有log(Mstar/Msun) = 6.10和log(MHI/Msun) = 8.71，以及log(Mstar/Msun) = 7.07和log(MHI/Msun) = 9.18。新的Gemini光学光谱将HI探测与其光学对应体联系起来。该群的三维速度弥散（188 km/s）、质光比（M_L/B ~44）、动力学与重子质量比（Mdyn/Mbary ~ 21）、大小（69 kpc）和气体分数（0.56）均与TNG50模拟中的致密矮群一致。该群具有顶部重的卫星质量函数，与LMC大小宿主星的预测不一致，可能由两个或多个群合并而成。Voronoi镶嵌显示该群位于两条纤维交叉点外的卷须中。大尺度结构中的这些中等密度环境为恒星形成、富含气体的矮星系群形成并最终合并提供了条件。我们的结果进一步表明，通过HI图谱可以发现矮星系宿主周围更暗弱的矮卫星。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：大尺度结构中的中间密度环境为富含气体的矮星系群形成和最终合并提供了条件，HI观测是发现矮星系宿主周围暗弱卫星的有效方法。

title: Self-calibration of weak lensing cosmic shear biases
summary: In order to reach the required performance of Stage-III and IV weak lensing surveys, cosmic shear measurements have to rely on external simulations to calibrate residual biases. Over the years, several techniques have been developed to mitigate the impact of residual biases prior to calibration, including the inference of shear responses on images to correct multiplicative biases, and the empirical correction of additive biases. We introduce a novel methodology that generalises upon the state-of-the-art approaches by inferring multiplicative and additive biases jointly from parameterised distributions of measured ellipticities, crucially without relying on external simulations and independently from cosmology. Shear biases are marginalised over the unknown hyper-parameters in the modelling, hence mitigating the impact of degeneracies. We apply the technique to a representative problem and show the performance of the estimation, even in the presence of noise. The method has a high potential for applicability to the calibration of weak lensing cosmic shear in current and future lensing surveys.

title: Bimetric MOND as a framework for variable-$G$ theories -- local systems and cosmology
summary: Bimetric MOND (BIMOND) is used as a platform for variable-$G$ theories that have MOND-specific idiosyncrasies. E.g., MOND premises dictate return to standard dynamics in the high-acceleration limit, predicting the standard value of $G$ for high-acceleration systems. This automatically ensures compliance of such theories with all the constraints on inconstancy of $G$ that emerge from the study of high-acceleration systems: geophysics, solar system, pulsars, supernovae, stellar evolution, emission of gravitational waves, etc. In MOND, constraints deduced from such phenomena have no bearing on possible $G$ variability in cosmology. My guiding motivation is to see if such theories may account for some roles of dark matter in cosmology; e.g., in accounting for the expansion history of the Universe in the matter-dominated era, by having a $G_e\approx 2πG$ govern the later stages of the expansion, instead of invoking matter density $\approx 2π\times$ baryon density. Without adding degrees of freedom, or new dimensionful constants, BIMOND can be extended to a class of theories that entail what is best described as phenomenon-dependence of Newton's constant, $G$. I cannot yet present a consistent model that complies with all the observations in cosmology, including the expansion history, with all its details. Instead, I describe some examples of theories in the class that predict different values of $G_e$ in different circumstances, including one where $G$ takes its standard value for all subcosmological systems -- even if they are deep in the MOND regime. I also discuss scenarios in which $G_e\approx G$ in the early Universe, as required by constraints from big-bang nucleosynthesis, but with $G_e> G$ setting in at later times, where it can affect the expansion history during the matter-dominated era.

artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：双度规MOND理论为研究可变引力常数G提供了有前景的平台，能够满足高加速度系统的约束，同时探索G在宇宙学中的可变性来解释暗物质作用。虽然尚未建立完全一致的宇宙学模型，但展示了理论可能性，特别是现象依赖的G值变化如何影响宇宙膨胀历史。

title: The eventful life journey of galaxy clusters. II. Impact of mass accretion on the thermodynamical structure of the ICM
comment: Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics. 13 pages, 9 figures, 1 table + appendices (4 pages, 4 figures)
summary:
Context. The internal structure of the intracluster medium (ICM) is tightly linked to the assembly history and physical processes in groups and clusters, but the role of recent accretion in shaping these profiles has not been fully explored.
  Aims. We investigate to what extent mass accretion accounts for the variability in ICM density and thermodynamic profiles, and what can present-day structures reveal about their formation histories.
  Methods. We analyze a hydrodynamical cosmological simulation including gas cooling but no feedback, to isolate the effects of heating from structure formation. Median profiles of ICM quantities are introduced as a robust description of the bulk ICM. We then examine correlations between mass accretion rates or assembly indicators with the profiles of temperature, entropy, pressure, gas and dark-matter density, as well as their scatter.
  Results. Accretion in the last dynamical time strongly lowers central gas densities, while leaving dark matter largely unaffected, producing a distinct signature in the baryon depletion function. Pressure and entropy show the clearest dependence on accretion, whereas temperature is less sensitive. The radii of steepest entropy, temperature, and pressure shift inward by $\sim (10-20)\%$ between high- and low-accretion subsamples. Assembly-state indicators are also related to the location of these features, and accretion correlates with the parameters of common fitting functions for density, pressure, and entropy.
  Conclusions. Recent accretion leaves measurable imprints on the ICM structure, highlighting the potential of thermodynamic profiles as diagnostics of cluster growth history.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过宇宙学模拟发现，星系团内介质（ICM）的热力学剖面受近期质量吸积影响显著，吸积率高的星系团中心气体密度降低，熵和压力剖面变化明显，这些特征可用于诊断星系团的形成历史。
AI.motivation: 星系团内介质（ICM）的内部结构与星系团/星系群的组装历史和物理过程密切相关，但近期吸积在塑造这些剖面中的作用尚未得到充分探索。研究旨在探索质量吸积在多大程度上解释了ICM密度和热力学剖面的变化，以及当前结构能揭示多少关于其形成历史的信息。
AI.method: 分析包含气体冷却但无反馈的流体动力学宇宙学模拟，以隔离结构形成加热效应。引入ICM量的中值剖面作为ICM整体的稳健描述，然后检查质量吸积率或组装指标与温度、熵、压力、气体和暗物质密度剖面及其散射之间的相关性。
AI.result: 最近一个动力学时间内的吸积显著降低了中心气体密度，而对暗物质影响不大，在重子耗尽函数中产生明显特征。压力和熵对吸积的依赖性最清晰，而温度敏感性较低。高吸积和低吸积子样本之间，最陡熵、温度和压力的半径向内移动约10-20%。组装状态指标也与这些特征的位置相关，吸积与密度、压力和熵的常见拟合函数参数相关。
AI.conclusion: 近期吸积在ICM结构上留下了可测量的印记，突显了热力学剖面作为星系团增长历史诊断工具的潜力。

title: Adding electromagnetic birefringence to pulsar timing and astrometry to detect gravitational waves
summary: It was recently shown that the time variation of the polarization of electromagnetic waves from pulsars can be used, in cross-correlation with pulsar timing, to probe the chirality of an isotropic gravitational wave background. Here, we show that the expression for the cross-correlation is derived efficiently with the total-angular-momentum formalism and use this framework to extend the formulation to cross-correlation with astrometry. We do so for spin-1 gravitational waves (that may arise in alternative-gravity theories) as well as the general-relativistic spin-2 gravitational waves.

title: CASCADE: Filamentary accretion flows in Cygnus X DR20
summary: Aims. We investigate the role of filaments in high-mass star formation, whether gas flows from large to small scales along them, and what their properties might reveal about the region they are found in. Methods. The Max Planck IRAM Observatory Program (MIOP), the Cygnus Allscale Survey of Chemistry and Dynamical Environments (CASCADE), includes high spatial resolution (~3'') data of HCO+(1-0) and H13CO+(1-0) emission in the star-forming DR20 region in the Cygnus X complex. In this data we identify filaments with the structure identification algorithm DisPerSE. We further analyze these filaments using Gaussian fits to the spectra to determine the line peak velocity and full width half maximum along them. The Python package FilChaP was used to determine filament widths. Results. We find projected velocity gradients inside several filaments between 0.4 to 2.4km/s over projected length-scales of 0.1pc toward star-forming cores. This can be interpreted as a sign of gas flowing along the filaments toward the cores. The filament width distributions exhibit median values between 0.06 and 0.14pc depending on the core, the tracer, and the method. Standard deviations are approximately 0.02 to 0.06pc. These values are roughly in agreement with the filament width of 0.1pc typically found in nearby low-mass star-forming regions. Conclusions. This first analysis of filamentary properties within the Cygnus X CASCADE program reveals potential signatures of gas flows along filaments onto star-forming cores. Furthermore, the characteristics of the filaments in this high-mass star-forming region can be compared to those of filaments in low-mass star-forming regions typically studied before. Extending such studies to the entire CASCADE survey will enhance our knowledge of high-mass filament properties on solid statistical grounds.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高分辨率观测数据分析了天鹅座X复合体中DR20区域的高质量恒星形成过程，发现丝状结构存在指向恒星形成核心的速度梯度，表明气体沿丝状结构流动，且丝状结构宽度与低质量恒星形成区域相似。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在探索丝状结构在高质量恒星形成中的作用，特别是气体是否沿丝状结构从大尺度流向小尺度，以及丝状结构特性如何反映其所在区域的特征。
AI.method: 使用MIOP项目的CASCADE调查数据，包括HCO+(1-0)和H13CO+(1-0)的高空间分辨率（~3''）观测。使用DisPerSE算法识别丝状结构，通过高斯拟合谱线分析速度梯度，使用FilChaP软件包确定丝状结构宽度。
AI.result: 在多个丝状结构中发现了0.4-2.4 km/s的投影速度梯度，投影长度尺度为0.1 pc，指向恒星形成核心，表明气体沿丝状结构流向核心。丝状结构宽度分布的中值在0.06-0.14 pc之间，与低质量恒星形成区域典型的0.1 pc宽度基本一致。
AI.conclusion: 这是CASCADE项目中首次分析丝状结构特性，揭示了气体沿丝状结构流向恒星形成核心的潜在证据。高质量恒星形成区域的丝状结构特性与低质量区域相似，扩展此类研究将增强对高质量丝状结构特性的统计理解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 目的：我们研究纤维结构在高质量恒星形成中的作用，探讨气体是否沿这些结构从大尺度流向小尺度，以及它们的性质可能揭示所在区域的哪些信息。方法：马克斯·普朗克IRAM天文台计划（MIOP）中的天鹅座全尺度化学与动力学环境巡天（CASCADE）包含了天鹅座X复合体中恒星形成区DR20的高空间分辨率（约3角秒）HCO+(1-0)和H13CO+(1-0)发射数据。我们利用结构识别算法DisPerSE在这些数据中识别纤维结构，并通过高斯拟合谱线确定沿纤维的线峰值速度和半高全宽，使用Python包FilChaP测定纤维宽度。结果：在多个纤维中，我们发现了朝向恒星形成核心的投影速度梯度，范围在0.4至2.4 km/s，投影长度尺度为0.1 pc。这可以解释为气体沿纤维流向核心的迹象。纤维宽度分布的中值在0.06至0.14 pc之间，具体取决于核心、示踪物和方法，标准差约为0.02至0.06 pc。这些值与邻近低质量恒星形成区域中通常发现的0.1 pc纤维宽度大致一致。结论：对天鹅座X CASCADE项目中纤维特性的首次分析揭示了气体沿纤维流向恒星形成核心的潜在迹象。此外，这一高质量恒星形成区域中的纤维特性可与先前通常研究的低质量恒星形成区域中的纤维进行比较。将此类研究扩展到整个CASCADE巡天将增强我们在可靠统计基础上对高质量纤维特性的认识。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 这是CASCADE项目中首次分析丝状结构特性，揭示了气体沿丝状结构流向恒星形成核心的潜在证据。高质量恒星形成区域的丝状结构特性与低质量区域相似，扩展此类研究将增强对高质量丝状结构特性的统计理解。
